name: create_asset
description: Upload and create a new video asset from a URL or direct upload. Mux will automatically transcode it into multiple resolutions for adaptive streaming.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Array of input objects specifying the video source. Each object should have a 'url' field pointing to the video file.

parameters.name: playback_policy
parameters.description: Array of playback policies. Use 'public' for open access or 'signed' for token-based access control.

parameters.name: encoding_tier
parameters.description: The encoding quality tier. Use 'smart' for cost-effective encoding or 'baseline' for standard quality.

parameters.name: normalize_audio
parameters.description: Whether to normalize the audio track loudness level.
